Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The GreenZone
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals and shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, and an optional overlay. Use /greenzone to open the window.
Changelog:
Studium Community dashboard support:
- Uploads Materia rank alongside Ravana rank for personal best seals records.
- Keeps existing seals and tier tracking behavior unchanged.
